metadata.description: Build AI spells for what you do — a meta-framework for turning recurring tasks into reusable skills, across six AI tools.

plugins.name: wizard
plugins.description: Build AI spells for what you do. Meta-framework that turns recurring tasks into reusable skills. 25 bundled spells (research, writing, decisions, work, dev), 12 framework skills, 12 workflow shapes. Works for researchers, founders, writers, devs — anyone.
